description: Limited-time promotional campaigns featuring contests, giveaways, coupons, and branded partnerships with clear call-to-action mechanics (QR codes, hashtags, entry instructions) designed to drive participation and purchases.
structural_recipe: Lead with urgency ('لا تفوّت الفرصة', 'مستمر معاكم طول') and highlight the prize/offer value prominently. Include interactive mechanics: QR code scanning, hashtag participation, or contest entry. Use branded partnerships to amplify credibility. Specify geographic availability or time limitations. End with clear CTAs using branded hashtags and emojis. Pair visuals of prizes, products, or exclusive offers with energetic copy.
why_it_works: Saudi audiences respond strongly to time-bound scarcity and competitive mechanics (contests, giveaways). Partnership with recognized international brands increases trust and desirability. Clear prize communication and geographic specificity (regional availability) builds confidence in redemption. Festive language and celebratory emojis trigger excitement and sharing behavior.
transplantation_caveats: Ensure all promotional mechanics comply with Saudi e-commerce and gambling regulations—avoid contest structures that resemble unlicensed betting
Geographic exclusions (e.g., 'ما عدا مكة، جدة، الطائف') require legal justification—verify licensing in target regions
QR code mechanics should be tested for device compatibility across older and regional mobile handsets
Partnership disclaimers must be clearly visible to meet consumer protection standards
cultural_constraints: Avoid gamification language that conflicts with Islamic finance principles; frame as 'participation' not 'luck-based'
Time-bound urgency must respect prayer times and Ramadan seasonality
Branded partnerships should align with halal/Islamic values of partner brands
